overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a Roman soldier character exploring a wooden fortification camp at dusk. The character walks through torch-lit scaffolding structures, sits at a wooden table to survey the area, then continues walking through narrow passages. The environment features wooden construction materials, canvas tents, and warm firelight against a dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fortification camp entrance with scaffolding towers

events.description: character slows down and approaches the wooden table with lantern

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit camp, passing wooden scaffolding and canvas tents

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with multiple vertical supports and horizontal beams
lit torch mounted on wooden post providing warm orange light
tall wooden palisade wall with vertical logs
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near tents
blue fabric canopy tent with wooden pole supports

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open construction camp area at dusk, with large wooden scaffolding structures ahead and torchlight illuminating the path. The environment features wooden fortifications, a parked cart, and canvas tents along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite area with wooden table and stone kiln

events.description: character sits down on wooden chair at the table
character stands up from the table and prepares to walk

agents.ego_description: sitting at a wooden table with a lantern, rotating the camera to survey the surrounding camp area

entered.detail: rough wooden table with papers and a lit lantern on top
simple wooden chair positioned at the table
domed stone structure with smoke rising from the top
wooden ladder leaning against the fortification wall
stacked wooden barrels and supply crates

segments.scene_description: The character sits at a wooden table illuminated by a lantern, with a stone kiln smoking in the background. The camera pans around to show wooden ladders, supply barrels, and the surrounding fortification walls while the character remains seated.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden walls and scaffolding

events.description: character stands up and begins walking away from the table

agents.ego_description: walking away from the campsite through darker narrow passages between wooden fences

entered.detail: wooden scaffolding ramp leading upward with red banners
tall wooden reed fence running along the path
stacked sandbags near the wooden wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the table into a darker, narrower section of the camp. The path is flanked by wooden fences and leads toward a wooden stair structure with red banners, with sandbags piled against the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Roman construction camp that shifts from an open, torch-lit plaza to a confined, shadowed corridor. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail past canvas tents and a parked cart, moving toward towering wooden scaffolding under a dusk sky. As the character reaches a wooden table, the camera pans around the seated figure to reveal a smoking stone kiln, supply barrels, and ladders leaning against the fortification walls. The scene then shifts as the character stands and walks away from the lantern light, entering a darker, narrower section of the camp. The path finally tightens between wooden fences and sandbags, leading toward a wooden stair structure adorned with red banners.
